/usr/bin/c++  -g   CMakeFiles/cpp_gateway.dir/src/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/cpp_gateway.dir/src/PythonApiClient.cc.o CMakeFiles/cpp_gateway.dir/src/HealthService.cc.o CMakeFiles/cpp_gateway.dir/src/DocumentService.cc.o  -o cpp_gateway  /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libdrogon.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libtrantor.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcares.a -lpthread -lpthread -ldl /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libjsoncpp.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libuuid.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libbrotlidec.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libbrotlienc.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libbrotlicommon.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libmariadbclient.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libhiredisd.a /root/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libz.a
